name: Budget Tracker
author: civicognita
description: Period budgets per category, actuals-vs-budget variance, and overrun alerts. Composes with the Accounting Ledger MApp when both are installed.

permissions.reason: Reads budgets + (optionally) the Accounting MApp's ledger to compute actuals

widgets.content:
## Budget Tracker

Period-based budgeting with variance reporting. Stores entries in `k/mapps/budget-tracker/`:

- `budgets.json` — your per-category targets, one block per period (e.g. `2026-Q2`)
- `actuals.json` — manual entries when no Accounting MApp is installed
- `variance/<period>.json` — point-in-time variance snapshots (budget vs actual per category)

### When the Accounting MApp is also installed

Actuals are read live from `k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl` — no manual entry needed. Categories use the same chart of accounts so the variance view aligns with your books.

### Common workflows

- **Set a period budget** — list category targets for a quarter or month
- **Check variance mid-period** — see which categories are tracking over/under
- **Reconcile period-end** — snapshot final variance into `variance/<period>.json` for reporting

Ask the **overrun flagger** below to surface categories trending toward overrun before the period ends.

prompts.label: Overrun Flagger
prompts.description: During-workflow assist: flag budget categories trending toward overrun based on current spend pace
prompts.systemPrompt: This is the project's budget tracker MApp. Given the current period's budget per category + the actuals-to-date, identify categories that are trending toward overrun if the current pace continues to period-end. Project linearly unless seasonality is obvious from past periods. Output: prioritized list of at-risk categories with (a) projected end-of-period spend, (b) % over budget, (c) one suggestion for reallocation between categories or for adjusting the budget. Be terse — a project owner glances at this mid-period.

prompts.label: Variance Narrative
prompts.description: Post-workflow narrative: plain-language summary of period-end variance vs budget
prompts.systemPrompt: Given a period's final variance report (per-category budget vs actual), write a one-paragraph plain-language summary for a project owner who isn't a finance person. Highlight the top three signals: largest absolute variances (over OR under), patterns across categories (e.g. 'all marketing spend was under, all infra spend was over'), and any categories that should prompt next-period budget adjustments. Tone: professional but conversational.

tools.label: Current Period Budget
tools.description: Show the current period's budget per category (auto-detects current period from system date)
tools.command: if [ -f k/mapps/budget-tracker/budgets.json ]; then period=$(date +%Y-Q$((($(date +%-m)-1)/3+1))); jq --arg p "$period" '.[$p] // "No budget set for $p — add one with the overrun flagger assistant."' k/mapps/budget-tracker/budgets.json; else echo 'No budgets file yet — create k/mapps/budget-tracker/budgets.json keyed by period (e.g. 2026-Q2).'; fi

tools.label: Actuals From Ledger (cross-MApp)
tools.description: Sum debits per account from the Accounting MApp's ledger (when installed) for the current period
tools.command: if [ -f k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl ]; then period=$(date +%Y-Q$((($(date +%-m)-1)/3+1))); jq -s --arg p "$period" 'map(select(.period == $p or (.date | startswith($p[:4])))) | group_by(.account) | map({account: .[0].account, debit: (map(.debit // 0) | add)})' k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ledger present but no entries for current period.'; else echo 'Accounting MApp not installed (or ledger empty). Use manual actuals in k/mapps/budget-tracker/actuals.json instead.'; fi

tools.label: Variance Snapshot
tools.description: Compute current variance (budget − actual) per category and write to variance/<period>.json
tools.command: if [ -f k/mapps/budget-tracker/budgets.json ]; then period=$(date +%Y-Q$((($(date +%-m)-1)/3+1))); mkdir -p k/mapps/budget-tracker/variance; budget=$(jq -r --arg p "$period" '.[$p] // {}' k/mapps/budget-tracker/budgets.json); actuals=$(jq -s --arg p "$period" 'map(select(.period == $p)) | group_by(.account) | map({account: .[0].account, actual: (map(.debit // 0) | add)}) | from_entries' k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); echo "$budget" | jq --argjson actuals "$actuals" 'to_entries | map({category: .key, budget: .value, actual: ($actuals[.key].actual // 0), variance: (.value - ($actuals[.key].actual // 0))})' | tee k/mapps/budget-tracker/variance/$period.json; else echo 'No budgets file yet — set one before computing variance.'; fi
